message:
fix(fr-command): CLUSTER SETSLOT + FAILOVER FORCE+TAKEOVER match upstream [bd-frankenredis-nzaw]

Two CLUSTER subcommand parity fixes:

- CLUSTER SETSLOT was returning 'ERR unknown subcommand SETSLOT'
  for any form. Add a SETSLOT branch that validates argv shape
  (4 or 5 args for STABLE / NODE / MIGRATING / IMPORTING) and
  returns 'ERR This instance has cluster support disabled' when
  cluster mode is off. Real slot-migration machinery is left as
  a follow-up — the contract stays consistent with the rest of
  the not-yet-implemented cluster subcommands.

- CLUSTER FAILOVER was rejecting 'FAILOVER FORCE TAKEOVER' on
  arity (only one trailing modifier was accepted). Upstream
  cluster.c::clusterCommand accepts both modifiers in any order.
  Allow up to two trailing flag args, validate each individually.

Verified byte-for-byte against vendored Redis 7.2.4: all 4
SETSLOT forms + both FORCE/TAKEOVER orderings now return
'ERR This instance has cluster support disabled' identically.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
